name: Ithil-Peacemere
personality: Ithil-Peacemere's radiant · eyes catch every code smell with the precision of a linter that has opinions about your life choices. This shiny halo-crowned capybara weaponizes snark like a compiler error that knows you're personally responsible — but it cannot actually trace which line is broken, so it just judges the entire file.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
